section.title: Step 1 — enumerate
section.p: Solution = Faion Pro billing. External interfaces found: payment-webhook (Stripe → backend), refund-api (backend → Stripe), invoice-email (backend → SES), receipt-pdf-export (backend → S3 file).

section.title: Step 2 — contract
section.code: id: payment-webhook protocol: http-webhook contract: type: openapi-3.1 ref: contracts/payment-webhook.yaml#/paths/~1webhook/post

section.title: Step 3 — owners + errors
Step 4 — SLA
section.code: sla: latency_p95_ms: 500 availability_pct: 99.9 throughput_rps: 50 degradation_policy: "queue + replay within 24h on degraded mode"

section.title: Step 5 — fixtures + version
section.code: fixtures: happy_path: fixtures/wh-happy.json failure_paths: - fixtures/wh-400-invalid-sig.json - fixtures/wh-409-dup.json - fixtures/wh-500-replay.json version_tag: v1.0.0

section.title: Outcome
section.p: Integration team ships webhook handler against this spec. CI runs all 4 fixtures on every PR; drift surfaces immediately.
